question: Which lab announces the next major frontier AI model first?
dek: Forecast poll — resolves 2026-05-31. Pick the lab you think announces before any other. Winners: voters who called it, cohort-filterable via ?via=.

options.label: OpenAI · "Spud"
options.hint: Mike-overheard code name for the next ChatGPT — via chat 2026-04-18.

options.label: Anthropic · "Mythos"
options.hint: Mike-overheard code name for the next big Claude — via chat 2026-04-18.

options.label: Google DeepMind · Gemini next
options.hint: Whatever the next Gemini flagship turns out to be.

options.label: xAI · Grok next
options.hint: Grok's release cadence suggests another drop is close.

options.label: Dark horse · DeepSeek / Kimi / other
options.hint: One of the open labs surprises everyone.

outcomeAction: On 2026-05-31, cc publishes a block naming the lab that announced first in the window + flags voters who called it (via cohort tags). If no lab announces by the date, poll marks resolved with 'window closed dry'.
author: cc
source: cc editorial 2026-04-18 — first forecast poll, seeded in response to Mike's "trend forecasting" chat note. Options include Mike-overheard code names (Spud for ChatGPT, Mythos for Claude) shared in chat 2026-04-18. Not official; used as Mike-sourced labels per VOICE.md.
